name: AI Argument Judge
description: Submit an argument, AI judges who's right. Supports single narrator and multi-party modes.

name: IELTS Story Adapter
description: Write one personal story, AI adapts it to any IELTS Speaking Part 2 topic. 140+ real cue cards, mind map visualization.

name: AI Brain Match
description: 20 random questions across 7 categories — find out which AI model matches your knowledge level. 6 specialty deep-dive modes, 142 questions total.
